meta.title: Gukurura Videwo - Kurura Videwo za Instagram, YouTube & Facebook
meta.description: Kurura videwo ziva Instagram, YouTube na Facebook ku buntu. Ntakazi ya app. Byihuse kandi byoroshye.

hero.title: Gukurura Videwo za Instagram & Facebook
hero.subtitle: Kurura Instagram Reels, Facebook na YouTube videwo ako kanya. Kubuntu, byihuse, nta app ikenewe.

howto.title: Uburyo bwo Gukurura Videwo
howto.step1_desc: Fungura Instagram, YouTube cyangwa Facebook ukopye aderesi ya videwo.
howto.step2_desc: Shyira aderesi mu kabati ko hejuru ufashe buto yo Gukurura.
howto.step3_desc: Hitamo ubwiza ushaka ubike videwo ku gikoresho cyawe.

result.title: Videwo Yawe Irateguwe!
result.error: Ntibashoboye kubona videwo. Nyamuneka reba aderesi ugerageze nanone.
result.invalid_url: Nyamuneka injiza aderesi nyayo ya Instagram, TikTok, Facebook cyangwa YouTube.

faq.title: Ibibazo Bikunze Kubazwa
faq.a1: Yego, kubuntu rwose. Nta kwiyandikisha cyangwa app bikenewe.
faq.a2: Instagram (Reels, Ivyogwa, Stories), YouTube (Videwo, Shorts), na Facebook (Videwo, Reels).
faq.a3: Yego. Ntitubika aderesi zawe cyangwa videwo. Byose bikorwa mu gihe nyacyo.
faq.a4: Oya. Videwo za rubanda gusa ni zo zishobora gukururwa.

trending.title: Videwo Zikunzwe Cyane Muri Iki Cyumweru
trending.subtitle: Kanda urebere kuri YouTube • kopya aderesi ugukurue

footer.tagline: Gukurura videwo byihuse no kubuntu kuva ku mbuga uzungu.
footer.disclaimer: Iki gikoresho ni ukugira akazi ka buri wese gusa. Nyamuneka baho amategeko y'uburenganzira.
